---
title: "H2"
author: "Zhibo Yang"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

packages <- c("tidyverse", "psych", "rstatix")

installed <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(!installed)) install.packages(packages[!installed])

library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(rstatix)

A <- read.csv("../Data/A_135.CSV", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
B <- read.csv("../Data/B_135.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "latin1")

# A = Informational advertising
# B = Transformational advertising
A$Ad_Type <- "Informational"
B$Ad_Type <- "Transformational"

data <- bind_rows(A, B)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(Q1:Q20, as.numeric))

data <- data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Purchase_Intention_Median = median(c_across(Q1:Q5), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # manipulation check
    Informational_Check = median(c_across(c(Q17, Q18)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Transformational_Check = median(c_across(c(Q19, Q20)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

alpha_purchase <- psych::alpha(data %>% select(Q1:Q5))
print(alpha_purchase)

descriptive_stats_median <- data %>%
  group_by(Ad_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Median_PI = median(Purchase_Intention_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_PI = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Median, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_PI = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Median, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_PI = IQR(Purchase_Intention_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Informational_Check = median(Informational_Check, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Transformational_Check = median(Transformational_Check, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(descriptive_stats_median)

h2_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data,
  alternative = "less",
  exact = FALSE,
  correct = TRUE
)

print(h2_wilcox)

effect_size_h2 <- data %>%
  wilcox_effsize(
    Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Ad_Type,
    alternative = "less"
  )

print(effect_size_h2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Ad_Type, y = Purchase_Intention_Median)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Purchase Intention Median by Advertising Type",
    x = "Advertising Type",
    y = "Purchase Intention Median"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
